analyze.verse_text: “Therefore, if you are offering your gift at the altar and there remember that your brother or sister has something against you, leave your gift there in front of the altar. First go and be reconciled to them; then come and offer your gift.

analyze.verse_text: All you need to say is simply ‘Yes’ or ‘No’; anything beyond this comes from the evil one.

analyze.verse_text: Do not be anxious about anything, but in every situation, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God.
analyze.why: You are asking for something, and the asking is the hard part.
